rag.title: Interroger le workspace
rag.description: Interrogez les tâches, documents, commentaires et le contexte projet avec des citations sécurisées.
rag.placeholder: Posez une question sur ce workspace...
rag.statusLoading: Chargement de l’état de l’index RAG...
rag.status: Chunks indexés : {{chunks}} · en file/en cours : {{queued}} · échoués : {{failed}}
rag.reindexFailed: Impossible de mettre les tâches RAG en file.
rag.error: La réponse workspace a échoué. Vérifiez les paramètres AI/RAG et les permissions.

agent.title: Plan with Agent
agent.description: Turn a natural-language goal into an approval-first Mythforge → project → task → subtask → assignee → deadline plan.
agent.safety: Agent writes are blocked until you approve the diff; every execution is audited.
agent.placeholder: Example: Plan a new product launch campaign for next month...
agent.planFailed: Agent planning failed. Check permissions, Mythforge membership and AI/RAG settings.
agent.approvalFailed: Could not approve selected agent steps.
agent.executeFailed: Agent execution failed or was partially blocked by policy.
agent.rollbackFailed: Agent rollback failed or partially failed.
